wins: Record revenue and net income in 2024
Strong growth in CCB with 10 million new card accounts
Record long-term net inflows of $234 billion in AWM
CIB ranked #1 with 9.3% wallet share in 2024
Healthy card loan growth and strong client engagement
risks: NII ex Markets down $548 million due to lower rates and deposit margin compression
Credit costs up $428 million year-on-year driven by Card
Potential for NII normalization to be slower than expected
Uncertainty around regulatory changes and capital requirements
Market volatility and policy uncertainty affecting loan demand
